title: The Best AI Apps for Your Accounting Firm Right Now
description: Know exactly which AI apps are worth your time and money today — crowd-sourced from over 1,000 accounting firms and organized by category. CPA Jason Staats breaks down what to use and what to skip.
globalInfo: Source: Jason Staats, CPA — LinkedIn post (2026-04-18 scrape). Crowd-sourced from 1,000+ accounting firms. Three non-negotiable categories: AI meeting assistant (Vinyl, Ping Assistant, Abacor), 1040 intake (StanfordTax, Soraban, Truss), and ChatGPT Business tier. Also covers AI-native GL alternatives (Digits, Kick), research tools (Blue J), and productivity tools (Ramp, MakersHub, NotebookLM, speech-to-text apps).
